tactical_shape: 4-3-3 / attacking approach with Kevin De Bruyne creating from wide areas and by the byline
Pressed for control and volume of shots but were blunt in attack; 15 shots to 4 before the late red card
Lost structure after Nathan Ngoy’s sending-off and were rattled in the closing stages
standout_players: Alireza Beiranvand was the decisive opponent, making the outstanding save of the match to deny Maxim De Cuyper
Kevin De Bruyne glittered in moments, especially with the byline cross/pass that nearly set up the opener
Thibaut Courtois was alert and made an instinctive save from Hossein Kanaanizadegan
Romelu Lukaku huffed and puffed on his first start for club or country in more than 12 months; De Cuyper missed a huge chance
fatigue_injuries: Jérémy Doku was absent through illness
Nathan Ngoy was reduced to 10 men after wiping out Mehdi Taremi
home_read.momentum: Pressure is building after another disappointing result and Belgium now face a must-win final group match to save their tournament.

tactical_shape: Credited for refusing to wilt and staying in the game under pressure
Used a free-kick routine and long throw threats to create moments; remained disciplined enough to keep Belgium out until the decisive save
Took advantage of Belgium being reduced to 10 men and finished the match with numerical superiority
standout_players: Alireza Beiranvand was the match hero with a miraculous, game-defining save and several other key stops; described by Amir Ghalenoei as one of Iran’s greatest goalkeepers and one of his best days
Ali Nemati made the critical intervention to stop De Bruyne’s cross before Beiranvand saved from De Cuyper
Mehdi Taremi had a precise finish ruled out for offside and was the player fouled by Nathan Ngoy
Hossein Kanaanizadegan tested Courtois with a bouncing effort
Saeid Ezatolahi forced a full-throttle shot at Courtois after Belgium’s error
fatigue_injuries: Ghalenoei noted Iran had only 16 hours’ preparation in LA, two flights and a heavy game
away_read.momentum: Iran’s belief is growing after back-to-back creditable draws, and they remain alive in the group with momentum and a goalkeeper inspiring them.
